title: Snowglobe Workflow
description: The contract between the dashboard workflow builder and the automation engine. {{event.*}} placeholders in step config strings are resolved against the triggering event; {{steps.<id>.<field>}} resolves against earlier steps' output in the same run (e.g. {{steps.s1.answer}} = the agent's report from step s1).

trigger.description: Either an event trigger (type omitted or 'event') or a schedule trigger (type 'schedule' with a cron cadence + lookback window over the event log).

type.description: 'event' (default): fire on a matching detection. 'schedule': fire on a cron cadence over aggregated logs.

event_type.description: Event triggers: the semantic slug to match ('*' = any). Schedule triggers: optional filter for the log aggregation.

zone.description: Optional; omit to match any zone

cooldown_sec.description: Dedup window: max one run per (workflow, zone) per window

cron.description: Schedule triggers: 5-field cron (min hour dom mon dow), e.g. '0 9 * * *' = daily at 09:00 (server time).

lookback_hours.description: Schedule triggers: how many hours of the event log to aggregate on each run (default 24).

config.description: Per-type config. h_agent: {task: google_form|ticket|custom_url, url, instructions}. composio: {action: drive_upload|sheets_append|slack_message, ...params}. condition: {expression}. voice: {text}. mcp: {server_url, tool, arguments}. inventory_adjust: {sku, delta}.
